message:
🐛 fix: AI Missions list blank state (#8143) (#8146)

* 🐛 fix: AI Missions list blank state when only terminal missions exist (#8143)

Fixes #8143

The mission sidebar's full-panel empty state was gated on raw
`missions.length === 0`. If a user's mission history contained only
terminal entries (completed / failed / cancelled) and no saved or
active missions, that branch was skipped and the component fell
through to the list view, which only renders sections for saved and
active missions. The result was a panel with:

- no list items (all missions filtered out by isActiveMission + saved)
- no "No active missions" message (guarded by missions.length === 0)
- no start-a-mission CTA

…which matches the #8143 report ("AI Missions list appears completely
blank, existing missions are not displayed").

Fix: gate the full-panel empty state on `listTotalMissions === 0`
(saved + active, the same source of truth used by the header count
after #5946/#6134). Also skip the branch when a search query is
active so the existing "no search results" sub-branch still fires,
and when an activeMission is set so a user drilling into a specific
mission's chat still sees it.

Defensive-fix note: I could not reproduce the exact user flow from
the issue report on console.kubestellar.io (demo mode seeds six
saved + one completed mission, so listTotalMissions is always >= 6
there). The latent bug pattern is real, though: any non-demo
deployment where a user has run missions that all reached terminal
state would hit it, and the issue reporter's wording matches that
symptom exactly.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 fix: avoid hex ratchet false positive on #8143 comment refs

Multi-line JSX comment without a '*' continuation prefix causes the
ui-ux-standard hex ratchet to match '#8143' as a hex color. Reformat
the comment to use ' * ' continuation lines and drop the hash-prefixed
issue references so the ratchet skips them.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -886,7 +886,18 @@ export function MissionSidebar() { )} - {missions.length === 0 ? ( + {/* + * Issue 8143 — Empty-state gate uses `listTotalMissions` (saved + active) + * rather than raw `missions.length`. Previously users whose mission history + * only contained terminal entries (completed / failed / cancelled) fell + * through this branch into the list view, which renders sections only for + * saved and active missions. The result was a panel with no list items, no + * empty-state message, and no CTA — i.e. "AI Missions list not visible". + * Gate on the visible-list total so those users see the CTA. + * `missionSearchQuery` is excluded so a failed search still surfaces the + * "no search results" branch below instead of this full-panel empty state. + */} + {listTotalMissions === 0 && !missionSearchQuery && !activeMission ? (

{t('missionSidebar.noActiveMissions')}
